title: Schleimkeim - Otze und die DDR von unten
original_title: Schleimkeim - Otze und die DDR von unten
overview: A punk documentary about the life and death of the GDR punk Dieter "Otze" Ehrlich and his band Schleimkeim aus dem Schweinestall. With the fall of the Wall, Otze loses not only his enemy images, but also his life at the price of freedom.
